statement: At 6:20 p.m. I checked the west glasshouse misting tanks and found no poison or contamination; staff were still preparing the area for the donor preview.
Around 6:35 p.m. I argued with Mara Venn about a rejected acquisition, and later I saw Mara receive a note before she went toward the west glasshouse.
At approximately 7:05 p.m. I saw Elias Roake leave the service corridor carrying a rolled blueprint tube.
From the refreshment station I heard the bell-timer sound at about 7:18 p.m., and I heard what sounded like glass cracking around 7:25 p.m.
